statement: VS Code disables runSubagent for subagents. A subagent cannot invoke another subagent — nested delegation is impossible. Design multi-level orchestration using flat dispatch from a single user-invocable coordinator, or use session memory for indirect coordination between agents.
publicSummary: Observed in VS Code core: runSubagent is explicitly disabled for agents running as subagents. Agents designed with multi-level delegation hierarchies (coordinator → lead → engineer) must use a flat dispatch model from a single top-level agent, or use session memory as an indirect coordination mechanism.
cautionNotes: This is observed VS Code behavior, not documented in official docs. May change in future releases.
